name: oh-my-auggie
tagline: Multi-agent orchestration for Augment Code — the "oh-my-*" experience for auggie
description: A community-driven multi-agent orchestration toolkit for Augment Code's auggie CLI. Provides autonomous pipeline (Explorer → Planner → Executor → Architect), persistence loops, CI/CD-native workflows, and enterprise-ready conventions.

installation.command: auggie plugin marketplace add archgate/oh-my-auggie && auggie plugin install oma@oh-my-auggie
